_comment: Debt-marker scanner config used by scripts/check-debt-markers.ts. `trackerPatterns` are JavaScript regex sources (matched case-insensitively); a TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX line passes if ANY pattern matches it. `allowlist` entries are `path:line` strings grandfathering an existing untracked marker. The ratchet only goes DOWN — pair new markers with a tracker reference or remove them; do not append to the allowlist without justification. The script never auto-edits this file: loosening requires an explicit commit by a human.
